validator_prompt: Review whether the report uses live-page/browser evidence to classify the Ant Design X hero animation type, separates fact from inference, and gives actionable implications for the NCHU wing hero.

architect_review.summary: The report uses Playwright live-page evidence, DOM inspection, network response headers and response body evidence to classify the Ant Design X hero robot as a Lottie JSON animation rendered as SVG with PNG image layers. It corrects the earlier static-screenshot inference and gives actionable project routes.
